buildAgents.title: Build Agents
buildAgents.name: Name
buildAgents.pauseAfterConsecutiveFailures: Self pause after consecutive failed builds:

alerts.buildAgentPaused: Build agent pause request sent successfully. The agent will not accept new build jobs and will gracefully finish the current build jobs or will cancel them after a configurable seconds.
alerts.buildAgentResumed: Build agent resume request sent successfully. The agent will start accepting new build jobs.
alerts.buildAgentsPaused: Pause request sent to all build agents. The agents will not accept new build jobs and will gracefully finish the current build jobs or will cancel them after a configurable seconds.
alerts.buildAgentsResumed: Resume request sent to all build agents. The agents will start accepting new build jobs.
alerts.cleanupTriggered: Cache cleanup request sent successfully. The agent will pause, prune the cache, then resume.
alerts.mavenWipeTriggered: Maven cache wipe request sent successfully. The agent will pause, delete the cache, then resume.
alerts.mavenWipeFailed: Failed to trigger Maven cache wipe.
alerts.gradleWipeTriggered: Gradle cache wipe request sent successfully. The agent will pause, delete the cache, then resume.
alerts.gradleWipeFailed: Failed to trigger Gradle cache wipe.
alerts.dockerClearTriggered: Docker image clear request sent successfully. The agent will pause, remove unused images, then resume.
alerts.dockerClearFailed: Failed to trigger Docker image clearing.

buildAgents.notFound: Build agent '{{ agentName }}' is currently not available.
buildAgents.notFoundHint: The agent may be offline or was replaced. Recent build jobs from this agent are shown below.
buildAgents.pauseAllWarning:
You are about to pause all build agents. This will prevent them from processing any new build jobs.
Are you sure you want to proceed?

clearDistributedData.title: Clear Distributed Data
clearDistributedData.descriptionFirst: This action will clear all distributed data. This includes the buildJob queue, the processingJobs map, the dockerImageCleanUp map, the buildAgents map, and the buildJobResults queue.
clearDistributedData.descriptionSecond: This action is irreversible and will lead in data loss. The system will take a few minutes to return to normal operation.
clearDistributedData.descriptionThird: If you are sure you want to proceed, please type 'CLEAR DATA' in the input field below and click the 'Clear Data' button.

maintenanceAction.title: Maintenance
maintenanceAction.subtitle: Trigger cache or Docker maintenance on this agent. The agent pauses, performs the action, then resumes.

reclaim.explanationIntro: This action runs against agent '{{ agentName }}' and goes through four steps:
reclaim.stepPause: Pause this build agent so it stops claiming new jobs.
reclaim.stepDrain: Wait up to {{ grace }} s for in-flight builds — any that do not finish in time are cancelled and re-queued for another live agent.
reclaim.stepDelete: Delete every item you check below.
reclaim.warning: Deleted files cannot be recovered. Maven and Gradle artifacts will re-download from Maven Central on the next build that needs them; Docker images will re-pull when the next exercise that needs them runs.
reclaim.optionMavenHelp: Wipes every file under /root/.m2 on this agent's host cache mount.
reclaim.optionGradleHelp: Wipes every file under /root/.gradle on this agent's host cache mount.
reclaim.optionDockerHelp: Removes Docker images that are not currently bound to a running container.
reclaim.typeConfirmPrompt: Type {{ word }} to enable the Confirm button:

disk.notYetReported: Disk usage not yet reported by this agent.
